mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, source_id, source_type, aggregate_key, aggregate_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceType}, #{aggregateKey}, #{aggregateCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE aggregate_key = #{aggregateKey} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET aggregate_count = #{count}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT type AS `type`, COUNT(*) AS count FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY type
